services/git-bridge/pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin version to a recent snapshot compatible with Java 21.
services/git-bridge/pom.xml.why_exists: Older plugin versions may lack support for the --release flag or fail to compile against newer JDK toolchains.

services/git-bridge/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target configuration with the release flag for Java 21 cross-compilation.
services/git-bridge/pom.xml.why_exists: The source/target flags are deprecated in newer JDKs and do not ensure correct bootstrap classpath usage for Java 21 features.

services/git-bridge/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Guava dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
services/git-bridge/pom.xml.why_exists: Guava 19.0 uses internal APIs or bytecode features incompatible with Java 21, causing runtime errors or compilation failures.

services/git-bridge/src/main/java/uk/ac/.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(int) with List.getFirst() to align with Java 21 API conventions.
Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for Java 21 compatibility.
services/git-bridge/src/main/java/uk/ac/.why_exists: List.get(0) is not deprecated but List.getFirst() is the preferred modern API introduced in Java 21; however, this is technically a polishment as get(0) still compiles and runs on Java 21. The intent is modernization.

services/git-bridge/src/main/java/uk/ac/.general_idea: Replace string concatenation with text blocks for multi-line SQL string definition.
services/git-bridge/src/main/java/uk/ac/.before:
"CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `projects` (\n" +
"  `name` varchar(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',\n" +
"  `version_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,\n" +
"  PRIMARY KEY (`name`)\n" +
")"
services/git-bridge/src/main/java/uk/ac/.after:
"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `projects` (
  `name` varchar(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `version_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  PRIMARY KEY (`name`)
)"""

services/git-bridge/src/main/java/uk/ac/.general_idea: Replace string concatenation with text blocks for multi-line SQL string definition.
services/git-bridge/src/main/java/uk/ac/.before: "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `url_index_store` (\n"+ "  `project_name` varchar(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',\n"+ ...

services/git-bridge/src/main/java/uk/ac/.general_idea: Replace explicit cast with pattern matching instanceof to simplify exception handling logic.
services/git-bridge/src/main/java/uk/ac/.before:
if (cause instanceof HttpResponseException &&
                    (((HttpResponseException) cause).getStatusCode() ==
                             HttpServletResponse.SC_UNAUTHORIZED ||
                    ((HttpResponseException) cause).getStatusCode() ==
                             HttpServletResponse.SC_FORBIDDEN))
services/git-bridge/src/main/java/uk/ac/.after:
if (cause instanceof HttpResponseException exception &&
                    (exception.getStatusCode() ==
                             HttpServletResponse.SC_UNAUTHORIZED ||
                    exception.getStatusCode() ==
                             HttpServletResponse.SC_FORBIDDEN))

services/git-bridge/src/test/java/uk/ac/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Runtime.exec(String) with Runtime.exec(String[]) to avoid deprecation warnings and potential parsing issues in newer Java versions.
services/git-bridge/src/test/java/uk/ac/.why_exists: Runtime.exec(String) is deprecated since Java 1.1 and may cause compilation warnings or errors depending on strictness settings; the array form is the standard API.

services/git-bridge/src/test/java/uk/ac/.general_idea: Replace Paths.get() with Path.of() to use the modern Java 11+ API for path creation.
Remove unused import java.nio.file.Paths after migrating to Path.of().
